Pharmacogenetic Tests 
To use the sharing features on this page, please enable JavaScript. 
What is pharmacogenetic testing? 
Pharmacogenetics (also called pharmacogenomics ) is the study of how your genes affect the way your body responds to certain medicines . Genes are parts of DNA Â in your cells that you inherit from your parents. You inherit two copies of each gene, one from each parent. Genes carry information that controls what you look like and ho
